description: MicroHire manages a dedicated AV warehouse inside The Westin Brisbane, stocked with professional-grade audio-visual and event technology equipment. Events at The Westin Brisbane use on-site stock first; specialised or high-volume kit can be supplied from Brisbane, Sydney, or Melbourne.

seasonalAvailability.peak: Peak Season (Nov–Dec, Mar–May): High demand across all categories; early booking essential. Specialty items may need to be transferred from central warehouses.
seasonalAvailability.normal: Normal Season (Jun–Aug): Standard lead times, good stock availability at Westin warehouse.
seasonalAvailability.lean: Lean Season (Jan–Feb, Sep–Oct): Best availability; flexibility for last-minute bookings.

categories.name: Audio Equipment
categories.description: Clear, reliable audio is the foundation of every successful event. Whether it's a boardroom meeting or a gala dinner in the Ballroom, sound must be evenly distributed and free from distortion. MicroHire ensures Westin has a versatile range of audio systems to suit small, medium, and large event spaces.

eventRecommendations.recommendation: Ideal for Q&A sessions, keynote speakers, and performances. Mobility and ease of use for formal and interactive settings.
Perfect for presenters who require hands-free operation. Headset mics for active presenters or fitness demos; lapels discreet for business attire.
Push-to-talk delegate and chairman units for structured discussions, board meetings, and summits.
Conferences, gala dinners, award nights, live entertainment, weddings.

categories.integrationAndScalability: Audio integrates with video and staging. External support available for larger events.
categories.operationalNotes: Stage monitors for performer feedback. Digital mixing desks for multi-input balance. Backup mics available.
categories.operationGuidance: Basic speech events can be self-operated after setup, but an audio technician is recommended for microphone mixing, troubleshooting, and smooth transitions.

availabilitySeasons.peak: High demand for gala and conference audio

categories.externalSupport: In-ear monitoring systems and concert-grade line arrays available from Brisbane HQ if required.

categories.name: Visual Equipment
categories.description: Strong visual delivery ensures messages are engaging, professional, and impactful. Westin Brisbane is equipped with projection, LED, and camera systems suited for both in-person and hybrid events.

eventRecommendations.recommendation: High-definition visuals, scalable for various spaces. Perfect for product launches, conferences, and exhibitions.
Presentations remain vivid in bright ballrooms. Critical for conferences and gala events.
Hybrid conferences, webinars, expos, and gala productions.

categories.integrationAndScalability: Seamless with audio and hybrid streaming. Scalable LED and screen options.
categories.operationalNotes: Test pattern and resolution scaling provided. Backup displays recommended for large events. PTZ for recording and live-streaming.
categories.operationGuidance: Single-projector presentations may be self-operated after setup, but operator support is recommended for multiple sources, switching, live cameras, or recording.

availabilitySeasons.peak: LED walls and large projectors in high demand

categories.externalSupport: Broadcast-grade cameras, ultra-wide LED walls, and touch-interactive displays available from Sydney and Melbourne.

categories.name: Lighting Equipment
categories.description: Lighting sets the mood, highlights key moments, and enhances brand presence. From subtle ambience to dramatic stage effects, Westin's AV lighting inventory is built for versatility.

eventRecommendations.recommendation: Bright, even lighting for speakers or performers on stage.
Track speakers or performers as they move.
Wash walls or pillars in brand colours for ambience and theme.
Gala dinners, cocktail receptions, themed parties, corporate launches.

categories.integrationAndScalability: Integrates with sound and video for synchronised shows. Pre-programmable cues.
categories.operationalNotes: Rigging may be required. Safety compliance with weight loadings. Control desks for cue-based events.
categories.operationGuidance: Lighting systems require a trained operator due to rigging, programming, and safety requirements.

availabilitySeasons.normal: Steady demand for stage and uplighting

categories.externalSupport: Gobos, lasers, and outdoor building projection systems available on request.

categories.name: Staging & Structures
categories.description: Staging gives presenters a platform, sets the tone, and enhances audience sightlines. MicroHire provides flexible, modular staging solutions that fit seamlessly with Westin's event spaces.

eventRecommendations.recommendation: Configurable for panels, keynote sessions, and entertainment.
Professional presence for speeches; integrate with confidence monitors and microphones.
Conferences, weddings, gala dinners, product launches.

categories.integrationAndScalability: Compatible with MicroHire lighting and AV. Blends with room aesthetics.
categories.operationalNotes: Engineering certification for builds. On-site safety checks by crew. Skirting and carpeting for finish.
categories.operationGuidance: Staging and structural systems require trained crew for compliant installation, safety checks, and changes during the event.
categories.externalSupport: Custom builds, large outdoor marquees, and branding walls supplied from Sydney/Melbourne.

categories.name: Event Technology Solutions
categories.description: Event technology extends engagement and enhances guest experience. At Westin Brisbane, MicroHire keeps the most commonly requested tech tools on hand.

eventRecommendations.recommendation: Registration, surveys, or digital signage at entrances.
Wayfinding, branding, or agenda displays.
Streamlined entry and real-time attendance tracking.
International conferences, expos, corporate summits.

categories.integrationAndScalability: Integrates with registration and hybrid platforms.
categories.operationalNotes: Connectivity checks required pre-event. Tech moderation available for hybrid events.
categories.operationGuidance: Simple kiosks or signage can be self-operated after setup, but operator support is recommended for hybrid moderation, interpretation, and live troubleshooting.

availabilitySeasons.peak: High demand for streaming and interpretation

categories.externalSupport: Additional kiosks, larger RFID deployments, and extra translation booths available from Brisbane HQ.

categories.name: Computers & Playback Systems
categories.description: Playback and computing equipment is essential for seamless delivery of digital content. MicroHire provides both standard and high-performance systems for Westin events.

eventRecommendations.recommendation: Preloaded with Microsoft Office and playback software; compatibility with most presenter content.
High-end video playback, mapping, and dynamic presentations.
Conferences, webinars, award nights, hybrid events.

categories.integrationAndScalability: Integrates with projectors, screens, and streaming.
categories.operationalNotes: Presentation remotes for wireless slide progression. Media servers for high-end playback.
categories.operationGuidance: Laptops, basic playback, and presentation remotes are self-operated once configured. Operator support is only needed for complex switching or media-server workflows.
categories.externalSupport: Additional servers and high-capacity systems available on request.

categories.name: Cables, Power & Rigging Essentials
categories.description: Behind every visible element is a backbone of safe, reliable infrastructure. MicroHire ensures Westin has the essentials stocked in-house.
equipmentTypes: Full cabling kits (HDMI, SDI, XLR, DMX)

eventRecommendations.recommendation: All events, particularly those with large setups or complex integration.

categories.integrationAndScalability: Essential for all AV and lighting at Westin.
categories.operationalNotes: PDUs for balanced power. UPS for emergency power. Rigging motors for safe overhead installation of lighting, screens, and trusses.
categories.operationGuidance: Power distribution and rigging infrastructure must be installed and managed by qualified technicians for safety and compliance.
categories.externalSupport: Heavy-duty rigging and additional motors available from Brisbane HQ.

items.name: Full cabling kits (HDMI, SDI, XLR, DMX)

categories.name: Special Effects & Theming Equipment
categories.description: For events that demand memorable moments, MicroHire equips Westin with impactful special effects.

eventRecommendations.recommendation: Enhance lighting beams and create atmosphere.
Energy for award ceremonies and celebrations.
Product launches, gala dinners, concerts, award nights.

categories.integrationAndScalability: Integrates with lighting and projection for immersive moments.
categories.operationalNotes: CO2 and haze for dramatic effect. Mapping kit for creative projection onto walls or 3D surfaces.
categories.operationGuidance: Special effects systems require qualified operators and venue approvals due to safety controls and compliance requirements.

availabilitySeasons.peak: High demand for gala and launch effects

categories.externalSupport: Large pyrotechnics, water projection, and laser systems available from Sydney HQ.
